/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/test.dir/test/Doctest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/test/core/TestErrorHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/test/core/TestU8String.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/test/lexer/TestLexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/test/parser/TestParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/test/semantic/passes/TestExplorationPass.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/test/semantic/passes/TestTypeCheckingPass.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/test/type/TestCompare.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/test/type/TestPrinter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/ast/AST.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/ast/Printer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/codegen/AllocManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/codegen/CodeGen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/codegen/CodeGenContext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/codegen/ExprCodeGen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/codegen/TypeConverter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/core/ErrorHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/core/U8String.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/lexer/Lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/lexer/Token.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/parser/Parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/semantic/common/Namespace.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/semantic/common/OperatorTable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/semantic/common/SymbolTable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/semantic/common/TypeCheckerContext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/semantic/passes/ExplorationPass.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/semantic/passes/TypeCheckingPass.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/type/Compare.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/type/Printer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/type/Type.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/type_refactor/Type.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/type_refactor/TypeFactory.cpp.o -o test  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/llvm-18/lib /usr/lib/llvm-18/lib/libLLVM.so.1
